ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the season */,
  "league" TEXT /* The league in which the team plays */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the season */,
  "number_of_weeks" INTEGER /* The total number of weeks in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* The name of the home stadium */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the head coach */,
  "founded" TEXT /* The year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team playing the game */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team name */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "playoff_stage" TEXT /* Playoff stage if applicable (e.g., Divisional, Conference) */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* The date the game was played */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* The location of the game (home or away) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* The stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The player's date of birth */,
  "height" TEXT /* The player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* The player's weight */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* The player's hometown */,
  "college" TEXT /* The player's college */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* The start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* The end date of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the stats belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the stats belong to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained by the player in the game */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Touchdowns scored by the player in the game */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Receptions made by the player in the game */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks (for defensive players) */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions (for defensive players) */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles (for offensive players) */,
  "punt_returns" INTEGER /* Number of punt returns */,
  "kick_returns" INTEGER /* Number of kick returns */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards (for quarterbacks) */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards (for running backs) */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards (for wide receivers and tight ends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Offensive Coordinator) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The coach's date of birth */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* The coach's hometown */,
  "education" TEXT /* The coach's educational background */,
  "coaching_start" TEXT /* The start date of the coach's tenure */,
  "coaching_end" TEXT /* The end date of the coach's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for standings record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses in the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws in the season */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Points scored against the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division in which the team plays */,
  "conference" TEXT /* The conference in which the team plays */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* The team's rank within the division */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* The team's rank within the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for playoff record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the playoffs (e.g., Wild Card, Divisional) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the playoff game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* The opponent in the playoff game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* The date of the playoff game */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the playoff game (home or away) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* The stadium where the playoff game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_refs" (
  "game_ref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game reference */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the game */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* The name of the referee */,
  "assistant_referee_1" TEXT /* The name of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2" TEXT /* The name of the second assistant referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_ref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_refs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_refs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user accessing the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* The user's email address */,
  "password" TEXT /* The user's password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* The user's access level (e.g., 1 for Coach, 2 for Analyst, 3 for Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
